category_sources: source_facts.description says simdutf provides fast Unicode conversion routines; official docs describe Unicode validation and transcoding at high speed.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use the lowercase display name simdutf.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site provides simdutf usage, API, C API, and command-line documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/simdutf/simdutf; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official simdutf docs describe SIMD-accelerated Unicode validation/transcoding, C++ APIs, and Base64 support.
